overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban street in Night City. The player character walks past the Fuyutsuki Electronics building, through a narrow underpass, along a sidewalk lined with vendor stalls and digital billboards, and ascends a ramp toward a highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to industrial building with large neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Fuyutsuki Electronics building

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away from the camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated red sign with white text reading 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' and Japanese characters
industrial building facade with horizontal corrugated metal siding
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off a section of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the bright red Fuyutsuki Electronics neon sign on an industrial building. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing construction barriers on the left while the corrugated metal building runs along the right. A distant pedestrian walks ahead in the foggy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow fog-filled underpass beneath building structure

events.description: enters dark foggy underpass beneath the building structure
exits underpass back into mixed street lighting with visible neon signs

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow passage beneath the concrete structure with limited visibility

entered.detail: massive concrete beams and supports forming a covered passage beneath the building
blue metal scaffolding railings running along the left wall of the passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, fog-filled underpass beneath the building. Concrete support beams and metal scaffolding line the narrow passage. Visibility is low due to atmospheric fog. The camera continues straight through the tunnel-like space before emerging back into the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street vendors and digital advertising

events.description: exits underpass onto open street with traffic lights and moving vehicles
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated vendor stalls and billboards while observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside food stall with glowing red paper lanterns
sedan driving past on the street following the green traffic light

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals showing green walk indicator
small food stall with red paper lanterns and illuminated menu displays
large illuminated billboard advertising Night City Police Department with 'Keep It Safe' text
automated vending unit with glowing product displays

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a foggy urban street with active traffic. The camera walks past a street vendor stall decorated with red lanterns and a large NCPD recruitment billboard. Vehicles drive past on the left as the traffic light changes, and the sidewalk continues alongside the distant corrugated metal building.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk transitioning to highway overpass ramp

events.description: begins ascending the concrete ramp leading to the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp toward the highway overpass while passing large digital billboards

entered.detail: massive red digital screen displaying a stylized face with cyan accents
concrete incline leading up to the highway overpass with yellow painted curbs
elevated highway passing overhead with support columns and fencing

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the sidewalk past a large digital billboard displaying a red face. The camera approaches and begins ascending a concrete ramp leading to a highway overpass. The overhead highway structure becomes prominent on the left as the camera climbs the incline, with the corrugated metal building still visible in the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit industrial sidewalk through a claustrophobic underpass and finally up toward an urban highway. It begins by moving past the bright red Fuyutsuki Electronics sign and construction barriers along a corrugated metal building in the foggy night. As the camera pushes forward, the open street vanishes into a dark, fog-filled underpass lined with concrete beams and metal scaffolding before emerging back into the city air. The scene then opens into a bustling street where the camera passes red lanterns at a vendor stall and an NCPD recruitment billboard amidst active traffic. Finally, the path leads past a large digital billboard of a red face and ascends a concrete ramp, climbing toward a prominent highway overpass as the industrial buildings recede into the distance.
